wordplay_note: The director who serves the machine
card_description: Curt (Dr. Dodd) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Vulcan's Hammer*. Director of Unity who serves the supercomputer Vulcan 3. Name note: The director who serves the machine. The bureaucrat as servant of artificial intelligence. First appears in *Vulcan's Hammer*.

reference.brief: Director of Unity who serves the supercomputer Vulcan 3
reference.significance: The bureaucrat as servant of artificial intelligence
